nasb.text: Behold, he goes up like clouds, And his chariots like the whirlwind; His horses are swifter than eagles. Woe to us, for we are ruined!”

esv.text: Behold, he comes up like clouds; his chariots like the whirlwind; his horses are swifter than eagles— woe to us, for we are ruined!

cnv.text: 看哪！他必如密雲湧聚， 他的戰車如旋風， 他的馬比鷹還快。 我們有禍了，我們滅亡了！

ccb.text: 看啊，仇敌必如云涌来， 他的战车快如旋风， 他的战马比飞鹰还快。 我们有祸了！ 我们灭亡了！
